description: hp.nic.in hosts Himachal Pradesh government web applications and department portals on NIC-managed subdomains. These sites provide services such as HR management, treasury queries, and departmental mobile/web applications.
summary: hp.nic.in exposes a small set of public-facing web endpoints on subdomains, including public data/query pages and a mobile-app backend; no public OpenAPI, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
